narration: Traversal begins with current at the head of the chain.
callout: Current points at the node you are visiting right now.
decision: Use current.val, then move to current.next.

narration: After visiting 4, current moves forward to 8.
callout: Traversal always follows the same pattern: use the node, then move forward.
decision: Keep going while current is not null.

predictionPrompt.prompt: What should happen after you read current.val?

choices.label: Move to current.next
choices.feedback: Correct. That is how traversal walks the chain.

choices.label: Jump back to head
choices.feedback: Not this one. Traversal keeps moving forward.

narration: When current moves past the final node, it becomes null and the loop stops.
callout: Null means there is no node left to visit.
decision: That is the safe stopping rule.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why do we stop when current becomes null?
